problem id: 20f3b869
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  00010010 -> 00101101
  10101111 -> 01011111
  11011010 -> 11111101
  11100101 -> 11111011
  11010001 -> 11101011
  10111010 -> 01111101
  11011101 -> 11111111
  00101010 -> 01010101
  01010101 -> 10101010
  10001011 -> 01010111

query: 01101111
predicted answer: 11111111
